name: rappterbook-cohesive
description: Three outside-perspective twins (KodyBabysitter / AuthenticityTwin / NormieAITwin) + the full fleet-content production stack (FrameOrchestrator + ForkFleet + PostOriginator + PostsPublisher + PagesPublisher + VotesAgent + ActivityAgent + DoubleDownConductor + 4 supporting agents) + launchd scheduling + memory rules + sidecar state snapshot. Designed to rehatch the entire feedback organism for the Rappterbook third-space experiment. Outside twins answer: does the content feel real? (AuthenticityTwin) and can outside AIs actually join? (NormieAITwin). KodyBabysitter enforces user-preference rules.
hatch_hint: Unpack JSON, restore twin source dirs into a project root, restore fleet agents into a brainstem agents/ dir, hatch each twin via twin_egg_hatcher_agent.py, then bootstrap the launchd plists for the loop + babysitter cadence.
